config sysname WLC-HQ
config interface create mgmt 10
config interface address dynamic-interface mgmt 10.0.10.5 255.255.255.0 10.0.10.1
config interface vlan mgmt 10
config interface create guest 20
config interface address guest 10.0.20.5 255.255.255.0
config wlan create 1 Corp Corp-SSID
config wlan interface 1 mgmt
config wlan security wpa wpa2 enable 1
config wlan enable 1
config wlan create 2 Guest
config wlan security wpa disable 2
config wlan broadcast-ssid disable 2
config wlan enable 2
config wlan create 3 Legacy Legacy-SSID
config wlan security wpa wpa1 enable 3
config wlan security ciphers tkip enable 3
config wlan disable 3
config radius auth add 1 192.168.1.10 1812 ascii secret
config radius acct add 1 192.168.1.10 1813 ascii secret
config mobility group domain HQ-MOBILITY
config network webmode enable
